commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And forty and one years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his grandmother's name was Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom. His mother's That is, his grandmother; unless we suppose, which is not improbable, that the Maacha here named is different from the Maacha mentioned ver. (Challoner) She was probably another grand-daughter of David's son, (Calmet) as such are frequently styled simply daughters. So David is called the father of Asa, (ver. ; Haydock) though he was really his great-grandfather. (Menochius).

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: His mother: That is, his grandmother; unless we suppose, which is not improbable, that the Maacha here named is different from the Maacha mentioned, ver. 2.
